title: Office Title
address_supplement: Apartment, suite, unit, building, floor, etc
activate_2fa_for_this_account: Activate two factor authentication for this account
automaticVacationDays: Vacation days will not be restarted automatically
see_your_time: See your time tracking violations and warnings. Go to Time Tacking to fix your violations.
to_modify_info: To modify any personal information, please submit edit request to your HR representative
noVacationStatisticsForYear: There is no vacation statistics available for this year
vacationYearEndDifferent: Please note that the vacation year does end on {{date}}. This means you can use any remaining vacation days from the previous year until this date.
totalAvailableDaysTooltip: The number of available vacation days may vary if you are on probation, as you only see the days currently available
totalUsedDaysTooltip: The number contains all vacation days taken in current year including those from previous years
vacationRequestSentExtra: You will get notified when your teamlead, CEO and HR approves your vacation request.
otherRequestSent: Your other absence day is sent!
otherRequestSentExtra: You will get notified when your teamlead, CEO and HR approves your request.
homeRequestSent: Your home office request is sent
homeRequestSentExtra: You will get notified when your teamlead, CEO and HR approves your request.
noSickOrVacationAbsenceTypesAvailable: You do not have "Sick" or "Vacation" absence day types available. Please check your settings or contact your administrator.

steps.vacationFirstApprovalText: Select requested days on the left. Please approve to continue.
steps.vacationSecondApprovalText: Send vacation request to your team lead. You can write an additional message for your request.
steps.firstCheckboxLable: Block my calendar during my vacation period
steps.secondCheckboxLable: Select as a half day request
steps.stepTwoText: Select an employee on your team to take care of your ongoing tasks when you are on vacation.
steps.sickFirstApprovalTextExtra: Send sick day report to send it to HR team.
steps.sickUploadPrompt: Please upload sick day report here
steps.sickSecondApprovalTextExtra: Send sick day report to send it to HR team. Your team lead will be notified as well.
steps.homeFirstApprovalText: Select requested home office day or days on the left. You can select days for the current week or for all month.
steps.homeSecondApprovalText: Send home office request to your team lead. You can write an additional message for your request.

uploadSickLeaveDocumentBeforeProceeding: Please upload a sick leave document before proceeding to the next step
